title: celtis glabrata
intro: Celtis glabrata, also known as the Argentine hackberry or Argentine ironwood, is a plant species within the Celtis genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Celtis glabrata include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems, as well as acting as an immune system booster. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world, including South America.
